data_description.name: Short label shown in the device name, e.g. 'Electricity House'
data_description.anbieter: Name of the energy provider or supplier
data_description.kundennummer: Your customer number from the provider's documents
data_description.beginn: Date from which the contract is valid
data_description.ende: Last day of the contract term
data_description.erinnerung_monate: How many months before contract end to show a cancellation reminder
data_description.notify_target: Home Assistant notification service for the cancellation reminder

data_description.anbieter: Name of the energy provider or supplier

data_description.beginn: Date from which the contract is valid
data_description.ende: Last day of the contract term
data_description.erinnerung_monate: How many months before contract end to show a cancellation reminder
data_description.notify_target: Home Assistant notification service for the cancellation reminder

data_description.arbeitspreis: Price per kWh consumed — found on your electricity bill
data_description.grundpreis: Fixed monthly charge regardless of consumption
data_description.abschlag: Monthly advance payment to your provider
data_description.jahresverbrauch: Estimated annual consumption in kWh — used for cost forecasting
data_description.verbrauch_sensor: HA sensor tracking your electricity meter — enables real consumption tracking and billing forecast
data_description.einspeiseverguetung: Feed-in tariff per kWh fed into the grid (e.g. for solar)
data_description.bonus: One-time sign-up or switch bonus from the provider
data_description.zaehlernummer: Meter number from your electricity bill
data_description.marktlokation: Market location ID (MaLo ID) or metering point ID from your bill
data_description.preisgarantie: Date until which the unit price is guaranteed

gas.title: Gas details
gas.description: Prices, usage (m³) and conversion to kWh via calorific value and state number.

data_description.gas_einheit: Unit used on your gas bill
data_description.arbeitspreis: Price per kWh of gas — found on your gas bill
data_description.grundpreis: Fixed monthly charge regardless of consumption
data_description.abschlag: Monthly advance payment to your provider
data_description.jahresverbrauch: Estimated annual gas consumption in the selected unit
data_description.verbrauch_sensor: HA sensor tracking your gas meter — enables real consumption tracking
data_description.brennwert: Calorific value Hs in kWh per unit — printed on your gas bill
data_description.zustandszahl: Conversion factor Z for gas volume — printed on your gas bill (usually 0.9–1.0)
data_description.zaehlernummer: Meter number from your gas bill
data_description.marktlokation: Market location ID from your gas bill
data_description.preisgarantie: Date until which the unit price is guaranteed

error.invalid_number: Not a valid number. Use a dot or comma as the decimal separator (e.g. 11.2 or 11,2).

init.title: Plan next contract
init.description: Enter the upcoming tariff. On the switch date Home Assistant promotes it automatically. Empty fields keep the current value. Leave 'Switch date' empty to remove a planned switch.

options.price_per_unit: Fixed price per unit (e.g. DE, AT, CH)
options.percentage: Percentage of fresh water price (e.g. US, UK, AU)
